text:
Manheim (マンヘイム, Manheimu) was a player in the game Greed Island. He was also a member of Team Asta and a member of Kazsule's Alliance. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 154 

Appearance

Manheim was a portly man with short hair, a vertical line-goatee, and downward-angled eyebrows. He wore a long-sleeved shirt under a large t-shirt, a pair of baggy trousers, and a snapback hat worn backward. 

Personality

Manheim displayed a laid-back attitude, in stark contrast to Asta's hot-tempered personality. 

Background

Manheim and his other teammates were pretty advanced in the game, as they collected 71 specified slot cards by the time they decided to cooperate with Gon and Killua. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Manheim, a member of Team Asta, attends a meeting of 15 players, arranged by Kazsule, to stop the Bombers from clearing the game. As the meeting escalates, Asta gets into a heated argument with a member of Gon's team, Killua. Manheim and his team member Amana stop the argument by offering two S-rank cards in exchange for information on the Bomber's abilities. When it's decided that the newly-formed alliance will look for "Plot of Beach", "Accompany" is used to transport the group to Soufrabi to find information on the card. 

Arriving at Soufrabi, Kazsule instructs them on how to obtain an SS-rank card, and the alliance members split into small teams to tour the town and gather information on the "Plot of Beach" card. A female NPC informs them that Razor and his fourteen devils, a group of pirates, rule over the city. She promises to tell them where the card is if they drive the pirates out of town. The alliance members then make their way to the pirates' base in the town and are challenged by the pirate Bopobo to a sumo match. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 155 Killua manages to beat him, and the group is led to the pirates' lighthouse base, where they are challenged to a series of sports trials, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 156 but they fail them all. Seeing that there's no possible way for the Bombers to collect the "Plot of Beach" card, Asta convinces most of the others to leave the alliance. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 157 

Manheim's name is mentioned in Gon's binder. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 After Gon and his group successfully defeat Razor and collect the rare card, they are contacted by Genthru, who mentions that Manheim and the rest of the alliance members are dead. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 17, Chapter 169 

Abilities & Powers

Gon's team estimated him to be too weak to defeat Razor's convicts, as turned out to be the case. Manheim could also not see the pirate boxer's teleporting uppercut. 

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Manheim was capable of utilizing Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121
